content: Thomas Kealy is a Data Scientist in Berlin, Germany. He previously built text analytics pipelines for the UKHO in the UK, and completed a PhD in Communications at the University of Bristol. His research interests were in Group Testing, Compressive Sensing, and Distributed variations of ADMM.
